text.title: Methodologies Index Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Slotting a new market-sizing methodology
example.note: New methodology: total-spend-modeling (pro tier). Decision: belongs to market-sizing group. Insert alphabetically: market-research-tam-sam-som, total-spend-modeling. Attach attrs: complexity=medium, produces=report. Bump count from 19 to 20. Run validator: 0 violations.
